name: Stir-Fried Buffalo in Black-Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup black bean puree (about 4 oz canned beans)
8 ounces buffalo meat, sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the black bean puree, soy sauce, cornstarch, sugar, garlic, and ginger.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the buffalo meat strips and stir-fry until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Pour the black bean mixture over the meat and stir to coat evenly.
6. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
7. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
